items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Ticket call history by counter', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data regarding the implementation or validation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for ticket call history but lacks concrete evidence to confirm its coverage, leading to an inconclusive status. No specific API reads or persisted state checks were provided to support the validation of this requirement.
